'''Dellis Yuls''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]]. He was Chief of Security for [[Ororo Transportation/Legends|Ororo Transportation]], the main rival of the [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] cargo company. The [[Human replica droid]], [[Guri]], twisted Yuls's neck until it snapped during an attack on the facility, and then shot him in the back to verify his demise.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}}
